use_codes.desc: METHOD OF DRUG DELIVERY VIA THE NASAL CAVITY
ACUTE TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE BY DELIVERING A POWDERED SUBSTANCE COMPRISING SUMATRIPTAN VIA A BREATH-POWERED DELIVERY DEVICE
TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE VIA DELIVERY OF SUMATRIPTAN VIA THE NASAL CAVITY
METHOD OF DELIVERING SUMATRIPTAN TO A NASAL CAVITY

indications.text:
ONZETRA® Xsail® is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults.
Limitations of Use
• Use only if a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient has no response to the first migraine
attack treated with ONZETRA Xsail, reconsider the diagnosis of migr...

Limitations of Use
 Use only if a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient has no response to the first migraine
attack treated with ONZETRA Xsail, reconsider the diagnosis of mi...
